hero.badge: A new way to plan trips
hero.headline: Picture the trip.
hero.subtitle: Tell us in one sentence what you want. Get a quoted proposal in seconds.

input.placeholder: Tell us about your next trip…

script.q1: I want to go to Cancún from January 10 to 18, 2 adults and 2 kids.
script.a1: Got it. Are you looking for all inclusive or something quieter?
script.q2: All inclusive, with a pool for the kids.
script.a2: Done. Should we add transfers and an excursion?
script.q3: Yes, private transfers. Tour to Isla Mujeres.
script.a3: Here you go. I built this proposal pricing live 👇

coreValue.title: From a loose idea
coreValue.subtitle: One conversation. Emilia understands, organizes and quotes.

speed.title: Plan trips in seconds
speed.desc: Turn a messy idea into a clear plan.

structure.title: Turn ideas into concrete proposals
structure.desc: Structure dates, destinations, travelers and preferences.

conversion.title: Respond faster and sell more
conversion.desc: Reduce friction between request and decision.

diferencial.title: Not a search engine.
diferencial.subtitle: It doesn't show you results. It understands intent and turns it into a trip.
diferencial.tagline: One conversation. One structure. One trip ready to sell.

useCases.title: One interface.
useCases.subtitle: Tap a card to see the details.

viajeros.title: Travelers
viajeros.desc: Plan your trip in natural language. Emilia organizes your ideas into a clear, priced itinerary.
viajeros.forWho: People who want to travel but don't know where to start.
features: Chat with no login or forms
Suggestions based on interests and budget

agencias.title: Agencies
agencias.desc: Add-on inside Vibook to power up your sales team.
agencias.forWho: Agencies looking to shorten the gap between request and proposal.
features: Integrated into your existing Vibook flow

mayoristas.title: Wholesalers
mayoristas.tagline: One interface for your whole network.
mayoristas.desc: White-label embedded in your platform, with setup and a monthly fee.
mayoristas.forWho: Operators distributing product to a network of agencies.

infraestructura.title: Plugged into the
infraestructura.subtitle: A conversational layer over providers, GDS and platforms. Every sentence becomes real options.
